rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Changing a login/sign-in function signature (e.g., removing parameters or altering return shape) in auth-service.ts breaks all callers — including callers outside the auth module. Always check cross-m","scope":"auth-service.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Sensitive fields in Payload collections use dual guard: `hidden: true` plus `access: { read: () => false, update: () => false }`. Reuse this pattern for any secret field.","scope":"Payload collections"},{"kind":"convention","text":"PBKDF2 hashing in this codebase uses `crypto.pbkdf2(password, salt, 25000, 512, 'sha256', callback)` — parameters are fixed; new utility must match exactly.","scope":"password hashing"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Password hash utilities are centralized into a standalone module (`password-hash.ts`) rather than inlined in hooks or AuthService, enabling reuse across login, registration, and reset flows.","scope":"password hashing utility"}]}
